title: Scaffold a new project in MSpec harness

events.message: Reasonix run created for BP-01: Scaffold a new project in MSpec harness

output_preview:
I'll start by exploring the codebase to understand the MSpec harness and any existing scaffolding patterns.

<｜｜DSML｜｜tool_calls>
<｜｜DSML｜｜invoke name="run_skill">
<｜｜DSML｜｜parameter name="name" string="true">explore</｜｜DSML｜｜parameter>
<｜｜DSML｜｜parameter name="arguments" string="true">Explore the repository root, looking for MSpec-related files, any "blueprint" or "bp" directories, and scaffolding utilities. Also search for any README or documentation about project creation.</｜｜DSML｜｜parameter>
</｜｜DSML｜｜invoke>
